text: Being here, I feel both intrigued and contemplative. The first space, with its glass walls and clean modern lines, invites me to pause and consider my surroundings—there is something clinical yet open about it, as if waiting for new possibilities or discoveries. Entering the second room, the colorful wall teeming with ideas about research and development pulls me toward curiosity and wonder. Here, I sense the palpable presence of human ingenuity: a dance between creativity and technology. These settings make me feel small but connected, aware of the collective pursuit of knowledge and the excitement of what lies ahead.
